data.title: More Perfect supports Pillars of the Community program to strengthen trust in US elections. Efforts aimed at bipartisan support.
data.description: Today, More Perfect revealed its endorsement of the Pillars of the Community (POTC) initiative, aimed at enhancing public confidence in the U.S. election process. By collaborating with More Perfect, POTC aims to increase its bipartisan efforts and outreach.

data.title: trivago N.V. to release Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 3, 2026 after market close; Webcast on Feb 4, 2026 at 2:15 PM CET.
data.description: trivago N.V., a prominent online platform, is set to reveal its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 3, 2026, following the closure of the market. The company, listed on NASDAQ as TRVG, will then host a webcast on February 4, 2026, starting at 2:15 PM CET / 8:15 AM. This event will offer insights from trivago N.V.'s management team regarding the outcomes for the period ending December 31, 2025. The report will be pivotal for stakeholders and investors interested in the company's progress.

data.title: Subway offers $20 gift cards to 737 middle seat passengers as open seating on a popular U.S. airline comes to an end.
data.description: Starting on Jan. 27, a popular U.S. airline will be offering a $20 Subway® gift card to 737 passengers who end up stuck in the middle seat. This marks the end of the airline's open seating policy, providing relief for millions of travelers from the cramped middle seat predicament. The initiative aims to ease the discomfort of passengers with an unwanted seat assignment, allowing them to enjoy a meal at Subway® as compensation.

data.title: Cook County Treasurer Pappas and Greek Consul General Koubarakis celebrate New Year with Vasilopita tradition in Chicago. #GreekCulture #ChicagoCelebration
data.description: In Chicago on January 22, 2026, notable figures including Cook County Treasurer Maria Pappas, Consul General of Greece Emmanuel Koubarakis, and The Very Reverend Archimandrite Dionysios Anagnostopoulos gathered. Also in attendance were clergy members from Greek Orthodox Metropolis of Chicago, elected officials, and consuls general.

data.title: PhotonPharma Inc. appoints Dr. William Warren to Board of Directors for developing Innocell™ for ovarian cancer.
data.description: Fort Collins in Colorado saw a significant development on Jan. 22, 2026, as PhotonPharma Inc. revealed the appointment of William Warren, Ph.D., to its Board of Directors. This biotech company is recognized for its work in autologous cancer immunotherapies and is currently working on Innocell™ for stage III/IV ovarian cancer. Dr. Warren will join the board immediately.

data.title: Forme Smart Power Bra (2026) praised by consumers as top post-mastectomy solution for posture recovery.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in New York, a report highlighted that women recuperating from mastectomy, lumpectomy, or other breast surgeries encounter difficulties extending beyond wound care. Issues like forward shoulder rounding, chest tightness, and upper back weakness can affect their overall comfort, movement, and posture in the long run.

data.title: PURE Property Management and HomeRiver Group merge to create PURE HomeRiver, securing $80 million in growth capital.
data.description: A new entity named PURE HomeRiver has been established following the merger of PURE Property Management and HomeRiver Group. The company will now operate as the largest third-party single-family rental (SFR) property management firm in the nation. The merger, finalized on January 22, 2026, brings together the strengths of both companies to create a powerhouse in the industry. With this consolidation, PURE HomeRiver aims to optimize its operations and enhance services for its clients. This move solidifies their position with a wider reach and increased resources to manage a substantial portfolio of single-family rental properties.

data.title: eGain announces Solve 26: London conference focusing on AI-powered knowledge management for customer experience automation.
data.description: eGain has revealed details about Solve 26 London - a conference that will span two days and focus on AI-powered knowledge management, customer success, and trusted AI at scale. This event is set to gather industry experts and professionals to deliberate on advancements and strategies in these areas.

data.title: Fareportal and Amadeus deepen partnership to drive innovation in travel distribution. New agreement signed on January 21, 2026.
data.description: Today, Fareportal, a prominent travel technology company operating popular travel brands like CheapOair and OneTravel, revealed an extended long-term partnership with Amadeus, a renowned travel technology provider. The collaboration was announced in New York on January 21, 2026.

data.title: SLTC, LLC and 12 North Capital merge to form national senior living investment platform under SLTC banner.
data.description: SLTC, LLC and 12 North Capital LLC have recently confirmed plans to merge, creating a robust senior living investment platform under the name SLTC. This agreement will bring together two entities with extensive experience in senior living investment and technology-based healthcare.

data.title: New dating platform Love's Gateway launches in the Bay Area, presents intentional Heart and Gatekeeper model for singles.
data.description: A new dating platform called Love's Gateway has been launched for singles in the Bay Area. This platform aims to provide a different approach to modern dating by incorporating a unique Heart and Gatekeeper model that involves personalized human input in the matching process. Unlike traditional swipe-based apps, Love's Gateway focuses on fostering more meaningful connections between users.

data.title: Global Brokerage The Agency opens third Oregon office in Lake Oswego, expanding reach. Located in Portland's popular area. Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: A leading global brokerage, The Agency, has opened its third office in Oregon, located in Lake Oswego. This expansion marks a significant milestone for the company, expanding its presence to a key area in Portland. The new office is set to cater to the growing demand for real estate services in the region. The Agency's latest venture aligns with its strategic growth plans and underscores its commitment to serving clients effectively.

data.title: 1 in 3 VPN users aim to conceal online activity from government, per PasswordManager.com survey. #InternetPrivacy
data.description: In Seattle on January 22, 2026, PasswordManager.com released findings from a recent survey reflecting worry among VPN users about online government surveillance. The study, involving individuals from various political backgrounds, emphasizes growing concerns over privacy. The data reveals a significant increase in VPN usage, highlighting a shift towards protecting online activities. This suggests that a larger number of individuals are taking measures to shield their internet browsing from potential monitoring.

data.title: Otto Group partners with Reply and NVIDIA to develop AI-driven virtual control system for robotics, improving delivery times and service levels.
data.description: In Turin, Italy, Reply [EXM, STAR: REY] is collaborating with the global retailer Otto Group to introduce a centralized, AI-powered virtual control system for intelligent robotic orchestration. The "Robotic Coordination Layer," a result of the partnership between Otto Group, Reply, and NVIDIA, facilitates the training, simulation, and orchestration of self-governing mobile robots and stationary systems. This innovation significantly boosts delivery speed and improves service quality. The system is focused on a cutting-edge hi-tech platform.
